message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state with latest bead definitions

The issues.jsonl file reflects the current state of the beads_rust issue
tracker after extensive work on the Aegis Engine (lock-free SPMC ring
buffers, zero-copy PTY pipeline, SIMD pattern matching) and ARS Engine
(PAC-Bayesian bounded swarm immune system) epics. This includes updated
acceptance criteria, user impact sections, and dependency wiring across
all sub-tasks in both epics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
